description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is predominantly white, with large rectangular windows arranged in both horizontal and vertical groupings, allowing for ample natural light. The property features a driveway with a parked car, a small patio area with outdoor furniture, and landscaped surroundings including several stylized trees and shrubs. The front entryway is recessed, with a small set of steps leading to a covered porch area. The rear of the house includes a spacious terrace and what appears to be a swimming pool, enhancing the outdoor living space. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on open spaces and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large windows, flat roof, driveway, patio, and landscaped yard. Features include a recessed entry, terrace, and pool.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the driveway, car, main entryway, and patio with trees on both sides.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the driveway, car, and large terrace area with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view with dense tree coverage, partial view of the terrace, and less visible entry features.
description_view_3: Direct front view showing the main entry steps, porch, symmetrical window arrangement, and pool in the foreground.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with steps, covered porch, and minimalist detailing
